shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- status ---\\n' && git status --short && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && rg --files src | head"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "react-hook-form form.subscribe clearErrors stale name type per-event metadata" --json --top-k 5'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '130,370p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '370,560p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '560,900p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '270,335p' src/__tests__/useForm/subscribe.test.tsx"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"function shouldRenderFormState|const shouldRenderFormState|shouldRenderFormState\" src; sed -n '1,140p' src/logic/shouldRenderFormState.ts; sed -n '1,120p' src/types/form.ts; git log -5 --oneline"
/bin/bash -lc 'git show --stat --oneline 6112441b && git show 6112441b -- src/logic/createFormControl.ts src/logic/shouldRenderFormState.ts src/__tests__/useForm/subscribe.test.tsx'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,150p' src/logic/shouldRenderFormState.ts; sed -n '1,150p' src/__tests__/logic/shouldRenderFormState.test.ts; rg -n \"shouldRenderFormState\\(|type:.*EVENT|payload.*type|callback: \\(\\{.*type\" src/__tests__ src | head -120"
/bin/bash -lc "node -e \"const p=require('./package.json'); console.log(JSON.stringify(p.scripts,null,2))\"; git diff --check; git diff -- src/logic/shouldRenderFormState.ts; git status --short"
